errors.genericRetry: Unexpected error. Try refreshing the page.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The event may have been removed or the link is out of date.

notFound.title: Event not found
notFound.description: The link may be outdated or the event was removed.

cancelled.title: Event cancelled
cancelled.description: The organisers cancelled this event. Information stays available for 30 days.

postponed.title: Event postponed
postponed.description: A new date is being announced. Follow the source for updates.

feed.summary: {events, plural, one {# event} other {# events}} · {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}

empty.title: No events match
empty.description: Try adjusting your filters — new events drop throughout the day.
